The Willverse spans four connected series. This page tracks which books have been ingested into the wiki. It is regenerated by the pipeline on each run.

'''Ingested: 26 / 26 books.'''

Legend: ✅ ingested &bull; 📥 EPUB ready (not yet ingested) &bull; ⬜ not available

== The Traveler's Gate Trilogy ==
{| class="wikitable"
! # !! Book !! Status
|-
| 1 || [[House of Blades (novel)|House of Blades]] || ✅ Ingested
|-
| 2 || [[The Crimson Vault (novel)|The Crimson Vault]] || ✅ Ingested
|-
| 3 || [[City of Light (novel)|City of Light]] || ✅ Ingested
|}

== The Elder Empire: Sea ==
{| class="wikitable"
! # !! Book !! Status
|-
| 1 || [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]] || ✅ Ingested
|-
| 2 || [[Of Dawn and Darkness (novel)|Of Dawn and Darkness]] || ✅ Ingested
|-
| 3 || [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]] || ✅ Ingested
|}

== The Elder Empire: Shadow ==
{| class="wikitable"
! # !! Book !! Status
|-
| 1 || [[Of Shadow and Sea (novel)|Of Shadow and Sea]] || ✅ Ingested
|-
| 2 || [[Of Darkness and Dawn (novel)|Of Darkness and Dawn]] || ✅ Ingested
|-
| 3 || [[Of Killers and Kings (novel)|Of Killers and Kings]] || ✅ Ingested
|}

== Cradle ==
{| class="wikitable"
! # !! Book !! Status
|-
| 1 || [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]] || ✅ Ingested
|-
| 2 || [[Soulsmith (novel)|Soulsmith]] || ✅ Ingested
|-
| 3 || [[Blackflame (novel)|Blackflame]] || ✅ Ingested
|-
| 4 || [[Skysworn (novel)|Skysworn]] || ✅ Ingested
|-
| 5 || [[Ghostwater (novel)|Ghostwater]] || ✅ Ingested
|-
| 6 || [[Underlord (novel)|Underlord]] || ✅ Ingested
|-
| 7 || [[Uncrowned (novel)|Uncrowned]] || ✅ Ingested
|-
| 8 || [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]] || ✅ Ingested
|-
| 9 || [[Bloodline (novel)|Bloodline]] || ✅ Ingested
|-
| 10 || [[Reaper (novel)|Reaper]] || ✅ Ingested
|-
| 11 || [[Dreadgod (novel)|Dreadgod]] || ✅ Ingested
|-
| 12 || [[Waybound (novel)|Waybound]] || ✅ Ingested
|-
| 13 || [[Threshold: Stories from Cradle (novel)|Threshold: Stories from Cradle]] || ✅ Ingested
|}

== The Last Horizon ==
{| class="wikitable"
! # !! Book !! Status
|-
| 1 || [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]] || ✅ Ingested
|-
| 2 || [[The Engineer (novel)|The Engineer]] || ✅ Ingested
|-
| 3 || [[The Knight (novel)|The Knight]] || ✅ Ingested
|-
| 4 || [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]] || ✅ Ingested
|}

[[Category:Meta]]
